name: Profiles Management
description: Adds Netflix-style multi-user profiles to Jellyfin. Allows a single account to have multiple isolated profiles with separate watch history, parental controls, and library access.
overview: Adds Netflix-style multi-user profiles to Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Fix Switch Profile button: now hidden during playback and on the server dashboard. Restore visibility on item detail/browse pages. Add explicit Enter/Space keydown handler for TV D-pad compatibility. Expanded platform docs (Roku, Xbox, PS4/5, Electron, Android native, Tizen/webOS version matrices, tvOS).

Add per-profile inactivity lockout timer (configurable: 1m / 5m / 10m / 20m / 30m / 1h / never). Silent PIN auto-submit on correct keystroke. Security fix: remove auth token from debug log. Cross-platform improvements: pointer events for Magic Remote, auto-focus on profile overlay.
